headline: Advanced Energy Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
summary: AEIS tops Q1 estimates as AI-driven demand fuels 26% revenue growth and surging data center sales, prompting higher 2026 growth targets.

headline: Analog Devices: Strongest Growth Outlook Among DAO Peers
summary: Analog Devices is outperforming DAO peers in 2026, driven by industrial segment strength and robust ATE market exposure. Click for this ADI stock update.

headline: 1 Momentum  Stock to Consider Right Now and 2 We Turn Down
summary: Exciting developments are taking place for the stocks in this article. They’ve all surged ahead of the broader market over the last month as catalysts such as new products and positive media coverage have propelled their returns.
